Wincham Consultants supply owners or prospective buyers of Spanish property legal and Taxation advice to structure the ownership of their Spanish property to significantly limit themselves and their Beneficiaries from Spanish Tax liabilities. Most people are unaware of the fact that when they or their partner dies the survivor may be liable for Inheritance Tax both in their country of domicile and in Spain. The additional Tax that their children will pay when the second partner or parent dies is an even bigger surprise. The third explosive fact is that the property cannot be sold to fund the taxes !
